sections.name: The Caterpillar Carriage
sections.text: The haunted construct known as the caterpillar carriage is composed of armored segments that flow over one another as the carriage inches forward. It has two forelegs that dig grooves into the ground, making way for the many wheels situated along its underside.

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Clockwork
traits.text: Clockworks are intricate, complex constructs that can be programmed to perform specific functions. A clockwork creature must be wound regularly to function.

traits.name: Construct
traits.text: A construct is an artificial creature empowered by a force other than vitality or void.

family.name: Haunted Clockwork

sections.name: Eerie Adornment
sections.text: All haunted constructs yearn to embellish their frames. They prize unique materials, delicate or skillful constructions, and ornaments. In addition to decorating their current body, they use these materials to build a new body as the haunted construct becomes larger and more powerful.

family.text: The constructs of the Clicking Caverns all have similar designs, being made of clockwork. The most unusual feature of them is that they’re self-replicating, or perhaps self-reincarnating, since the animation of a haunted construct requires a soul.

universal_monster_ability.name: Darkvision
universal_monster_ability.text: A monster with darkvision can see perfectly well in areas of darkness and dim light, though such vision is in black and white only. Some forms of magical darkness, such as a 4th-level *darkness* spell, block normal darkvision. A monster with greater darkvision, however, can see through even these forms of magical darkness.

universal_monster_ability.name: Tremorsense
universal_monster_ability.text: Tremorsense allows a monster to feel the vibrations through a solid surface caused by movement. It is an imprecise sense with a limited range (listed in the ability). Tremorsense functions only if the monster is on the same surface as the subject, and only if the subject is moving along (or burrowing through) the surface.

automatic_abilities.name: Like Clockwork   Trigger The caterpillar carriage gains the slowed or stunned condition
automatic_abilities.effect: The carriage is quickened for 1 round.

traits.name: Reach
traits.text: This weapon can be used to attack enemies up to 10 feet away instead of only adjacent enemies. For creatures with reach, the weapon increases their reach by 5 feet.

traits.name: Agile
traits.text: The multiple attack penalty you take with this weapon on the second attack on your turn is –4 instead of –5, and –8 instead of –10 on the third and subsequent attacks in the turn.

universal_monster_ability.name: Constrict
universal_monster_ability.text: The monster deals the listed amount of damage to any number of creatures grabbed or restrained by it. Each of those creatures can attempt a basic Fortitude save with the listed DC.

ability.name: Rescue
ability.text: The caterpillar carriage absorbs a willing construct within its reach. That construct doesn't exist separately until the caterpillar carriage releases it as an Interact action or is destroyed.

ability.name: Rock Tunneler
ability.text: The caterpillar carriage can burrow through solid stone at a Speed of 20 feet. It can leave a tunnel if it desires, and it usually does.

universal_monster_ability.name: Trample
universal_monster_ability.text: The monster Strides up to double its Speed and can move through the spaces of creatures of the listed size, Trampling each creature whose space it enters. The monster can attempt to Trample the same creature only once in a single use of Trample. The monster deals the damage of the listed Strike, but trampled creatures can attempt a basic Reflex save at the listed DC (no damage on a critical success, half damage on a success, double damage on a critical failure).
